source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Striker Jones shoots a powerful bazooka to explode the Bloons and push them back on hit.

3.description: Concussive Shell: Shoots a guided shell following target priority, stunning whatever Bloon it hits.

4.description: All Bomb Shooters and Mortar Monkeys on screen shoot 10% faster.

5.description: Makes all Black Bloons less resistant to explosive damage from all Monkeys.

6.description: Blast radius and pops for Jones' normal attacks increases greatly.

7.description: Pops 4 layers per shot and Mortar Monkeys blast radius increased by 10%. Target Focus: For 15 seconds Mortar Monkeys target touch/cursor with increased accuracy.

8.description: Towers near the hero get +5% range and +25% pierce.

9.description: Increased attack speed and increased Concussive Shell pierce, damage, and stun.

10.description: Artillery Command: Resets cooldown on all Bomb Shooters and Mortar Monkeys.

12.description: Slightly increased attack range and pops 2 extra layers per shot.

14.description: Concussive Shell affects a larger area and for a longer duration.

15.description: Concussive Shell cooldown reduced to 11 seconds.

17.description: Increased range and pops 8 layers per shot.

18.description: All Bomb Shooters and Mortar Monkeys attack an additional 10% faster.

19.description: Increased attack speed and makes all Black Bloons vulnerable to explosive damage.

20.description: Artillery Command also gives double damage and pops per shot to all Bomb Shooters and Mortar Monkeys for 10 seconds.
